title: Personal recipe customization write core
summary: public 원본 불변과 history snapshot을 보존하면서 generation-bound owner-private create/fork/update/save-as-new/soft-delete를 single-RPC write core로 잠근다.
goal: 개인 레시피의 identity, provenance, session generation, revision, idempotency와 삭제 경계를 한 transaction authority로 고정하고 #7 propagation 및 #8 activation 전에 안전하게 dark-ship한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, operations, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, backend implementation, security/DB review, five-axis review, Stage 3 re-review and closeout; no session approves its own work

dependencies: account-session-generation-foundation Stage 1 docs merged; runtime F0 remains an implementation predecessor
product-ingredient-link-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1076; runtime remains an implementation predecessor
recipe-visibility-read-hardening Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1077; runtime remains an implementation predecessor
recipe-snapshot-authority-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1078; runtime remains an implementation predecessor
personal-recipe-editor-decoupling Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1079; #5 owns UI composition
31-recipe-media-tags is currently in-progress and must be merged before implementation
36e-recipe-tags-frontend is currently ready-for-review and must be merged before implementation
cooked-batch-weight-ledger #8 compatibility gate precedes R+2 activation

external_smokes: merged-exact-SHA remote read-only function ACL RLS policy and capability inventory
two-owner direct-DML and non-disclosure role matrix with before-after digest
G1 delayed write delete G2 recreation race produces no cross-generation row
public source immutable fork and same-id versus new-id identity smoke
idempotency and same-revision concurrency exactly-once smoke
soft-delete new-selection denial and pinned-history preservation smoke
capability-off current and immediate-previous legacy compatibility with zero new personal mutation
production capability remains off until #7 and #8 release gates

verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of all five Stage 1 core artifacts plus roadmap and status projections
separate Codex security and DB review of RLS ACL session generation common locks idempotency soft delete cleanup and dark activation
separate Codex Stage 3 implementation review and final closeout review

out_of_scope: Future-plan impact endpoint preview token replace-all keep target Meal shopping and active claim propagation owned by #7
Alternate or partial public PATCH contract before #7 integrates the official final body
Snapshot-v2 session-attempt start cancel complete exact pantry completion cooked batch and activation owned by #7 and #8
Recipe Detail editor shell CTA navigation state UI design wireframe or authority evidence owned by #5
Legacy planner manual create conversion or public manual row automatic privatization
User-facing history trash restore publish or MYPAGE RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL edit UI
Public recipe mutation other-owner existence disclosure or client-selected authority
New public endpoint request response field status or error code
Unmerged remote migration production database write or capability activation
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned and approval not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/DB and five-axis reviews approve with zero required findings. Stage 1 verify_commands are current docs validators, focused workflow tests, lint, typecheck, audit and diff only. Backend migration/RPC/RLS/PostgreSQL/real DB/E2E/remote and release evidence are future artifacts. Design is N/A because #5 owns all UI. #6 may dark-ship recipe-local write core but must not expose an alternate PATCH; #7 integrates future impact and #8 gates R+2 activation.
